personas.name: The Grateful Free User
personas.description: A user who actively sought a meditation app that is genuinely free and ad-free, and deeply values Medito's non-profit model. They often come from paid apps like Headspace or Calm and appreciate unrestricted access to all content.
goals: Access high-quality meditation content without paying or seeing ads
Use the app long-term without being pressured into a subscription
Optionally donate to support the app on their own terms
pain_points: Other meditation apps lock content behind paywalls
Ads interrupt the calm experience of meditation sessions
Feeling guilt-tripped or pressured by other apps to upgrade
context: Previously used paid apps like Headspace or Calm
Looking for a sustainable free alternative
May be in a financially constrained situation
constraints: Must have full access to content without payment
No advertisements during or between sessions
Donation must always be optional and pressure-free

personas.name: The Confused First-Timer
personas.description: A new user who downloaded Medito expecting a fully free experience but encountered donation prompts or perceived paywalls before being able to use the app. They feel misled by the app's marketing and are hesitant to continue.
goals: Try the app before committing any money
Understand what is free versus what requires a donation
Have a transparent and honest onboarding experience
pain_points: Donation screen appears before any content is accessible
No clear way to skip the donation prompt on Android
Feels deceived when the app is advertised as free but prompts for payment immediately
Nag screen persists even after donating
context: Motivated by the free and no-paywall marketing
constraints: Must be able to access at least some content without any payment
Donation prompt must have a clearly visible skip option
Onboarding must not feel like a bait-and-switch

personas.name: The Frustrated Returning User
personas.description: A loyal Medito user who has built a consistent meditation habit but is experiencing technical issues such as app crashes, audio stopping, broken sync across devices, or streak loss after updates. They are emotionally invested in the app and frustrated when bugs interrupt their practice.
goals: Resume meditation sessions without crashes or interruptions
Maintain streak and progress data across multiple devices
Have audio play reliably through earbuds and with screen off
pain_points: App crashes when attempting to play a meditation
Audio stops when screen turns off or earbuds are connected
Streak and sync data lost after an update or device switch
Swipe gestures conflict with phone navigation gestures
Session not marked as complete when exiting slightly early
context: Regular daily user with an established streak
Uses multiple devices or recently switched phones
Relies on earbuds or background audio during sessions
constraints: App must not crash during active sessions
Progress and streaks must sync reliably across devices
Audio must continue playing with the screen off

personas.name: The Wellness Seeker
personas.description: A user who turned to Medito during a difficult period in their life — struggling with anxiety, poor sleep, stress, or addiction. They use the app therapeutically and credit it with meaningful improvements to their mental health and daily wellbeing.
goals: Reduce anxiety and stress through daily meditation
Improve sleep quality using sleep-focused meditations
Build emotional resilience and mental clarity over time
pain_points: Difficulty falling asleep quickly requiring multiple consecutive meditations
No queue feature to play several sleep meditations without opening the phone
Having to interrupt a relaxing state to manually change sessions
context: Using the app at night for sleep or during anxious moments
May be dealing with anxiety, insomnia, stress, or addiction recovery
Highly emotionally connected to the app and its impact on their life
constraints: Sessions must play without requiring phone interaction once started
Sleep meditations must be accessible quickly and without distraction
App must feel calm and non-intrusive in its design

personas.name: The Beginner on a Journey
personas.description: A first-time meditator who found Medito as their entry point into meditation. They value structured courses, clear guidance, and a simple interface that doesn't overwhelm them. They are building a new habit and rely on the app's course progression to stay motivated.
goals: Learn how to meditate from scratch using structured beginner courses
Build a consistent daily meditation habit
Progress through courses at their own pace without feeling overwhelmed
pain_points: Unable to download sessions for offline use
Unclear how to navigate to offline download options
Wants to continue practice while traveling or without internet
context: New to meditation with little or no prior experience
Following a specific course from start to finish
May be traveling or in areas with limited connectivity
constraints: Courses must be clearly structured and easy to follow
Offline download must be discoverable and easy to use
Interface must be simple and not overwhelming for new users
